c7-4-improvement-113.last_note: Built+ran reusable n=4 search infra (CP-SAT MIS, ILS, ARW, product seed); best=102, independently re-validated 0 confusable pairs under engine rule. 102<108<113 = NO beat, no Lean cert. Sharp diagnostic: generic exact+local search cold-stalls at 102, can't even reach record 108; need to SEED from explicit literature 108-set and repair toward 113. Angle live (CHANGES REQUESTED).
c7-4-improvement-113.summary: Exact/near-exact MIS on C_7^⊠4 (2401 verts) via ILP with Z_7^4-simply-transitive WLOG-fix + dihedral/S_4 symmetry-breaking, targeting α≥113 (→3.26039 beat); consolation = certified dual ceiling pinning n=4 inside [108,115]. Cert = decide over C(113,2)=6328 pairs.

c7-4-orbit-restricted-search-113.last_note: Built orbit-lattice search (360 good Z_7 generators, orbit-union MIS, ILS/SA repair); best=105 (15 size-7 orbits, gen (1,3,4,3)), independently re-validated 0 confusable pairs under engine rule. 105<108<113 = NO beat, no cert. Honest finding (not theorem): single-orbit-unions cap ~105 across all generators (B&B timed out, not proven); local repair can't escape symmetric basin. Needs stronger MIS engine / multi-orbit seed. Angle live (CHANGES REQUESTED).
c7-4-orbit-restricted-search-113.summary: Cyclic-orbit/coset-restricted near-exact MIS on C_7^⊠4: search unions of small Z_7-orbits (343 reps) + local repair toward α≥113 (→3.26039 beat); genuinely distinct search space from the full ILP, same Lean decide cert.

lean-cert-engine-and-367-baseline.last_note: Lean cert engine + 367-set verified axiom-clean: S367_indep by pure kernel decide (NO axioms, no native_decide), C7/strong-power graph faithful, confusable_iff_C7conf + isNIndepSet_of_cert sound, 367^(1/5)>3.2578 proven, ThetaGeFromIndep honest named boundary (carries only the trivial sup-ge-member step). Independently re-derived 0/67161 confusable pairs from the Lean source. Reproduces record, no beat; foundation for any future C_7^n beat.
lean-cert-engine-and-367-baseline.summary: Build the C_7^⊠n decidable independent-set cert engine + Θ-bridge soundness lemma; Lean-verify the PS2018 367-set as a search-immune baseline (reproduces 3.2578, no beat).

orbit-reduced-decide-witness.summary: Cyclic-orbit reduction: prove translation-invariance of cyclic distance so the C(N,2) pairwise check collapses to ~N difference checks, making large-N decide certs tractable.

symmetry-guided-search-c7-5-368.summary: Symmetry-restricted (multi-orbit / local-search) hunt for a 368+ independent set in C_7^⊠5 → 3.25964 beat; the genuine bound-move, historically static since 2018, uncertain payoff.
